disambiguated.context: Both a line cook and a psychologist had their bags searched at the airport. A drug-sniffing dog had signalled that officers should look into the bag of the line cook and, sure enough, they found quite a bit of heroine. After the psychologist's bag was flagged and searched, though, they were let go as it was apparently just a false alarm.
disambiguated.question: Who had drugs on them?
